description:
Extends the lowering and both drivers to compile real fz functions, not just single-clause toys.

Scope:
- Multi-clause functions: lower the whole function as one CLIF function with a guard chain (clause-1 patterns+guard → body, fall-through to clause-2, …, raise no-match panic at end).
- Guards: must be in the scalar-pure subset (arith, comparisons, boolean, tuple field reads). Guard outside subset → compile error.
- Tuple patterns: destructure into Cranelift values; nested tuples ok.
- Self-tail-calls: detect direct recursion in tail position, lower as a CLIF loop with parameter rebinding. Mutual TCO out of scope.

Verification: fact, fib, classify, scalar-only sum-style functions all run identically in tier-0, jit, and AOT binary.
title: Multi-clause + guards + tuple patterns + self-TCO (both backends)
